## Transcript

How to use Genspark AI. Hello everyone and welcome back. In today's video, I'll be showing you guys how you can get started with Genspark AI. So, what exactly is this AI tool and what can it do? Well, Genspark AI is a new age AI tool which allows you to build slides, sheets, downloaded content, AI chats, calls, and much more. They have different agents which can serve different purposes. Whether you're looking for their super agent which can help you in planning and calling, if you're looking to build slides like me, if you want to download certain papers mentioned in LinkedIn, or if you want to follow along and grasp a bunch of your concepts via sheets and you can take any of your assignments and have them be summarized or find 20 ideas for YouTube videos, analyze metrics in sheets. You can do deep research, calls, fact check, and you have some basic insights. Now, within the basic agents of GenSpark, we have AI chat as well as a image studio and a generate video. Now, these are a mixture of multiple different agents. These are not their own native agents. So, let's get started with GenSpark. So, to get started, simply head on over to genpspark.ai. Once you do that, you're going to click on sign up, and we're going to be signing up using Google. You can sign up with your email address, whatever you prefer. I'm just going to be clicking on Google. And then we're just going to be adding our email and proceeding on with our sign up. Now, the best part about using GenSpark is that it is available for free. There are no payment systems that you have to get started with. So, once you have signed up, you can get started. And the first feature that I would like to show you guys is their basic ask feature. So on the bottom you will have the research options where you can paste in any LinkedIn URL, Twitter URL, website or description and you can do a manual input as well. So you can choose your own nickname, your occupation, what traits should your GenSpark have as well as any custom instructions for GenSpark. This allows you to personalize it to your personal liking. Then below that you also have tools. So you can install Google suite, Gmail, drive and calendar. Now starting off I'm just going to ask it to give me a list of cool psychology ideas theories like so. And just like that, Gen Spark is just going to provide us with a list. It's going to find the ideas for us using the tool. And it's currently thinking. So you guys can see it is now showing us different fascinating theories and concepts and I can just click on view and then on the right it has started peril search and based upon what it has found we have now started building our list. So the dark triad, mood freezing, theory of mind, the bystander effect, facial feedback, double foot in the door. So we have social identity theory, hindsight bias, the Dunning Krueger effect, we have the Charles Bonnet syndrome, prototype theory, and then we have encoding, depth processing theory and more. So you guys can see it is still providing us with a bunch of different theories and cool ideas. Now this is a really basic functionality of using Gen Spark. Genspark is far more interesting. So, if you want to spice it up a notch and you want to further use GenSpark for some of its more advanced features, go into AI slides on the left. Once you do that, you will see your AI slides option. And on the bottom, you have new chat and then you have new updates. Now, you can also go into the mic option to dictate what type of slides you want. You can also attach a word file or a word document as well. So I want to build a create slides for a presentation on double foot in the door theory or cognitive dissonance. And after that I am just going to provide it with some more details. If I want if I want to include certain things such as maybe the history, the theories relating to this, the background, the movements, I can add that as well. So it is currently going to try to gather information that it finds relevant on its own and you can help it as well. You can provide your own information or your own document if you do have that. But if you don't, it's not necessary for you to provide that. You can just leave it as it is and the AI tool will do the research on its own. So once the research has been completed, then it's going to start creating the slides as well. On the right you can see it is starting to code up the slides and you can click on preview to take a look at the previews. You can click on code to take a look at the code and then you can go into the thinking where we can actually see how it is actually thinking the slides through and how it is making the idea come to life. So you basically have these three tabs which you can navigate in between. So currently this is what it is coding and still the coding is going on and then you're going to just wait for the complete presentation to be generated. I think it has generated our first page cognitive dissonance and this includes a key overview a definition and then after that and now it is building our second slide already. And these are the elements or the bits that are going to be included in the second slide. And now we're just going to be waiting for it to step by step generate all of our pages. Now it can generate as many pages that are going to be required based upon the slide topic that you might have or based upon whatever type of slides you are creating, whatever type of presentation you are making or on the complexity of the word doc that you have. So it it does need to decipher all of that before it can properly build the page. You guys can see here this is what the second page looks like and it looks really nice. Who was the the you know founder of this theory, the development of the theory and then the key insights from the original research, what exactly the theory is and then a space to add the image of that particular scientist. I'm just going to pause this over here because you guys can see what it looks like. Now, not only do you have the ability to create these amazing slides, but you can click on factcheck content where you can fact check the content to ensure there are no mistakes and you can select to edit. So, you can select then to edit any of the elements. So, if I want, let's say I do not want to add the key overview element. I can click on delete to delete any of these elements like I would regularly be editing any slide or any PowerPoint presentation that I would have created on my own. Now moving forward, we also have AI sheets. So if you go into AI sheets, we're going to remove some of our basic prompts and you can enter your data or you can enter a analysis request. So find the top rated YouTube videos on psychology and give me a list or give me a sheet of their key metrics. And just like that, it is going to do the analysis and then it's going to provide us with a sheet of all of the relevant metrics that it can find such as subscribers, likes, as well as views on their videos, so on and so forth. Now, after that, you also have AI chat, which is included for pro users. And then you have your advanced agents, which you can also use. Now, you can invite friends and get some credits for free. And you can also choose to upgrade where if you do choose to upgrade, you get access to more credits and you're able to utilize the power of Gen Spark. I hope you guys found this video helpful and if you guys did find this video helpful, make sure to leave a like and subscribe and I will catch you guys in the next

# Genspark’s Deep Research Agent Outperforms a Frontier Closed Model in Quality and Tool Calls using Fireworks RFT, Achieving a 50% Cost Reduction

PUBLISHED 10/31/2025

![Genspark’s Deep Research Agent Outperforms a Frontier Closed Model in Quality and Tool Calls using Fireworks Reinforcement Fine Tuning, Achieving a 50% Cost Reduction ](https://fireworks.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Fpv37i0yn%2Fproduction%2Fa9c03b24dc404d6f64a147e99030cfb1f4536714-1600x900.png%3Fauto%3Dformat&w=3840&q=75)

[Genspark](https://www.genspark.ai/), a leading innovator in the AI-powered application workspace, excels at delivering Agentic Full-Stack Web Applications, ranging from advanced Deep Research Search Agents to AI-generated Slides, Documents, and Sheets. By leveraging Fireworks’ Reinforcement Fine Tuning to train large state-of-the-art open models, in one month Genspark achieved 12% better quality and 33% more tool calls than a state of the art (SOTA) closed-source model , leading to a 50% cost reduction and superior answer quality.

![Graph showing the Quality and Tool Call Comparison between Open and Closed Source Model](https://fireworks.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Fpv37i0yn%2Fproduction%2F859ff6fbae00cde4d2f77fc8b8b25c1e16de6348-1024x768.png%3Fauto%3Dformat&w=3840&q=75)Figure 1: Quality & Tool Calls on Fireworks OSS vs. Frontier Closed Source Model

\*Note: These were measured by Fireworks AI

### **How does Genspark’s Deep Research Agent work?**

'Deep Research' AI agents are designed to perform complex, multi-step research tasks autonomously. The [Genspark Deep Research tool](https://www.genspark.ai/agents?type=agentic_deep_research) is an AI-powered agent designed to automate and streamline the process of conducting thorough, multi-source investigations and generating comprehensive, structured reports on a given topic. Genspark’s Deep Research tool puts together a team of the best AI Models to collaborate for you.

An example scenario would be if a user asks a query such as “Explore cutting-edge methods and tools that can be used to optimize inference“, the agent will try to use different tools in a skillful manner to derive a final research report about the query. The agent will repetitively append the tool call result to the messages and ask LLM to generate the next steps. The execution will stop when the agent collects enough information.

![Image of Genspark Deep Research Example ](https://fireworks.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Fpv37i0yn%2Fproduction%2F0da73888fc0ffc4a92c0c199c6e7f47ce8126a83-1748x1020.png%3Fauto%3Dformat&w=3840&q=75)Figure 2: Image of Genspark Deep Research Example

### **What was the challenge?**

**The Challenge: Hitting the quality wall with closed source models**

Genspark's Deep Research application streamlines the process of going from a single query to a well-structured, multi-source report, saving you hours of manual work and allowing you to focus on the insights and analysis that matter most. Genspark’s goal was to drive the best quality, and user experience. They initially started with a SOTA closed source model, but faced challenges when they wanted to scale, and add more customization. Genspark required a Mixture of Agents(MoA) that required multiple tool calls that were very specific to their workload. This was challenging to do with a proprietary model, because the only way to do customization on a proprietary model would be to use prompt engineering . As they would like to provide a more comprehensive research report to their users , they wanted to customize their model by finetuning.

### **The Solution- Achieving Better Quality than SOTA Closed Source Models**

By leveraging Fireworks, Genspark aimed to use reinforcement learning to fine tune capable large open source models to build up a unique state-of-the art Deep Research Agent. Fireworks provided Genspark with three key capabilities to unlock improved quality, more tool calling, and 50% reduced cost.

> **Genspark’s CTO Kay Zhu said,** “We are really excited to see what we were able to achieve partnering with Fireworks. Fireworks enabled us to own our AI journey, and unlock better quality in just four weeks. This resulted in a better user experience for our customers.”

> **Flame Zhou, Research Engineer at Genspark spoke about the collaboration,**“We are excited to be partnering with Fireworks to deploy our Deep Research Agents using Fireworks. Outstanding work! We’ve achieved fantastic results with the post-training on Kimi-K2. We conducted a series of systematic benchmarks for the deep\_research task, and the conclusions are really positive. It performed comparably to SOTA closed source models in detailed human evaluations. It uses tools more frequently and skillfully, which we are excited to see.”

**1.Seamless 1-Click transition from training to deployment with best in class performance on OSS models with reinforcement fine tuning.**

In order to fine-tune a large 1 Trillion Parameter Model like Kimi K2, powerful infrastructure combined with cutting edge hardware like NVIDIA H200 and B200 are required. The Genspark team needed a partner to help provide the infrastructure to deploy such a large model.

Fireworks removed the complexities with running fine-tuning on large models by providing a seamless managed service, deploying on new HW, and enabled best-in-class performance with Reinforcement Fine-tuning on NVIDIA’s B200 for Genspark’s open-source model of choice Kimi K2.

**2\. Better quality and tool calling than a proprietary model**: allowed the Genspark team to inject more unique ideas directly into the model, and create richer answers.

Genspark's core agent orchestrates exploration and solutions by skillfully utilizing a diverse array of tools, which can include software, sub-agents, or other LLMs. The selection of LLMs is dynamically tailored to suit various use cases. To ensure optimal output for the Research Agent, Genspark used Fireworks’ Reinforcement Fine Tuning with their custom data set to significantly improve the quality compared to a SOTA closed source model.. Additionally, Genspark prioritizes maximizing tool call support, and with the RFT optimizations unlocked a 33% jump in tool calls. A greater number of supported tool calls directly enhances the user experience. The improved quality and higher number of tool calls resulted in a better Quality Answer to Genspark Deep Research Tool.

| Model | Reward Score | Average Number of Tool Calls |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Closed Source Proprietary Model | .76 | 3.74 |
| Deepseek v3.1 | .69 | 2.78 |
| Qwen 235B A22B Instruct 2507 | .35 | 2.83 |
| Kimi-K2 Instruct Base 0905 | .65 | 2.86 |
| Kimi-K2 Fine Tune | .82 | 5 |

Table 1: Reward Quality Rate and Tool Call Count per Model on Fireworks

**3\. Dedicated quality support from research engineers:** enabled Gensparkto Own Their AI Journey

This commitment to providing quick and high-quality answers proved to be a game-changer. Genspark worked directly with one of our expert research engineers to help expedite their development. Whenever a technical question arose or an issue needed troubleshooting, the Genspark team could rely on Fireworks team to provide quick and high quality responses. This seamless support meant that the Genspark Engineers could focus on innovation and development without being slowed down by technical roadblocks. This expert level support enabled Genspark to deploy a complex optimized solution from POC to Production in 4 weeks.

#### **Key Takeaways**

The collaboration between Genspark and Fireworks significantly enhanced the Deep Research Tool's capabilities, delivering several key benefits:

- •**Seamless infrastructure for a 1 trillion parameter open-source model**: Eliminated the challenges of fine tuning and deploying on cutting-edge NVIDIA hardware
- •**Surpassed frontier closed source model in both quality and tool call performance with RFT:** Results in a 50% cost optimized higher quality response
- •**Accelerated time to production with premium support**: Went from POC to Production in 4 weeks

# 15 New Genspark Features You Should Try

### Everything Genspark has launched since May 2025. Spoiler alert: It's a lot!

[![Daniel Nest's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!FDds!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc3cf75e3-f197-48b0-999b-d73cbb1a8ad5_1321x1321.jpeg)](https://substack.com/@whytryai)

[Daniel Nest](https://substack.com/@whytryai)

Jan 29, 2026

13

2

2

Share

> _Prior version of this article [first appeared as a guest post](https://www.ai-supremacy.com/p/genspark-ai-tool-unicorn-superagent-ai-workspace) for [AI Supremacy](https://open.substack.com/pub/aisupremacy)._

* * *

In May 2025, I [wrote about Genspark’s transition](https://www.ai-supremacy.com/p/gensparks-stunning-ai-pivot-to-super-agent) from pure AI search to a one-stop agent platform. I recommend reading that article to get a feel for Genspark’s vision and agent hierarchy:

[![Diagram titled Genspark agent hierarchy showing three-tier pyramid of new Genspark features: super agent, advanced agents for workflows, and basic agents for tasks](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!zBi-!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2f9b9580-e996-4cc0-ad40-4a8898f717bd_745x493.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!zBi-!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2f9b9580-e996-4cc0-ad40-4a8898f717bd_745x493.png) Source: **[Genspark’s Stunning AI Pivot](https://www.whytryai.com/p/genspark-beginner-guide)**

But Genspark continued to release new agents, tools, and features with surprising regularity.

On November 20, 2025, Genspark gained “unicorn” status when it [announced $275M Series B](https://mainfunc.ai/blog/genspark_ai_workspace_and_series_b_funding).

Genspark is now a feature-rich platform that unifies almost every area of generative AI under a single roof.

Let’s look at every major Genspark launch since my last article and what you can use it for.

Why Try AI is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.

Subscribe

## **1\. AI Drive (May 15, 2025)**

Introducing the World's First Full Agentic Download Agent & AI Drive! - YouTube

Tap to unmute

[Introducing the World's First Full Agentic Download Agent & AI Drive!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mTb7F8jpsIY) [Genspark Products & Guides](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/channel/UC0SWcHpA_TA00XUN9qZUn8w)

![thumbnail-image](https://yt3.ggpht.com/onqpn6cY-AzdiJfkEsVNQXbDpbvxm5Dft071j2OqgcJGILeCYSXF72zwM1_Ir6QkNm5iR4HV=s68-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj)

Genspark Products & Guides31.6K subscribers

[Watch on](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mTb7F8jpsIY)

### **What is it?**

**[AI Drive](https://mainfunc.ai/blog/genspark_download_agent_and_ai_drive)** is a 1GB space within your Genspark dashboard for storing documents, images, and so on.

But what makes it “AI,” exactly?

Two things.

First, you can ask the Genspark Super Agent to save files from the web to your AI Drive. The Super Agent understands your natural-language request and autonomously finds exactly the type of files you’re after.

Second, anything in your AI Drive can later be accessed and used by Genspark’s other agents. Think of it as your Google Drive on steroids, powered by all of Genspark’s AI features.

### **Example use case**

Let’s say I’ve heard about Nano Banana Pro and want to see what it’s capable of. I can simply tell Genspark Super Agent the following:

> **Prompt:** _“Search Twitter/X for examples of Nano Banana Pro use cases, and download 10 of the best images that effectively demonstrate its capabilities.”_

[![Screenshot of Genspark AI Workspace showing prompt input to search X for Nano Banana Pro use cases, highlighting new Genspark features and AI tools interface](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!Ow9g!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F25dc226c-4538-48f9-81d2-02892b4cc790_665x219.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!Ow9g!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F25dc226c-4538-48f9-81d2-02892b4cc790_665x219.png)

Genspark goes to work independently. After several minutes, I have a new folder in my AI Drive with the requested images:

[![Screenshot of Genspark file workspace showing Nano Banana Pro example images folder, highlighting new Genspark features and AI-generated visuals](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!sOqf!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F0d6e7b3a-592e-46fc-a112-96777d84e40d_1172x380.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!sOqf!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F0d6e7b3a-592e-46fc-a112-96777d84e40d_1172x380.png)

This saves a lot of time compared to the alternative of finding and downloading files one by one.

## **2\. AI Secretary (June 4, 2025)**

Apart from all the AI browser features, being able to download and have offline chats with AI models is great. It’s one of the easiest ways to install and run models directly on your computer if you’re not technical.

Here, I was able to download llava-7b and have near-instant private chats:

[![Screenshot of Genspark AI Browser 2.0 showing an offline chat with the llava-7b model, demonstrating private local AI conversations and third-party model downloads on desktop](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!gPi5!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F0a5715fd-9efb-4443-8811-af5651438888_793x655.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!gPi5!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F0a5715fd-9efb-4443-8811-af5651438888_793x655.png)

**[Photo Genius](https://mainfunc.ai/blog/genspark_photo_genius)** lets you make live edits to photos by chatting with Genspark using voice. Unlike other Genspark tools, this feature requires you to download the Genspark Workspace app for iOS or Android.

This one’s pretty straightforward, and the demo video covers it well. Try it with your own photos to see what kind of edits you can make.

## **12\. Custom Super Agent & Agent Store (October 15, 2025)**

🚀 Introducing Genspark Custom Super Agent \| Build Your Own AI Agent with One Prompt - YouTube

Tap to unmute

[🚀 Introducing Genspark Custom Super Agent \| Build Your Own AI Agent with One Prompt](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oEsxQVYosAs) [Genspark Products & Guides](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/channel/UC0SWcHpA_TA00XUN9qZUn8w)

![thumbnail-image](https://yt3.ggpht.com/onqpn6cY-AzdiJfkEsVNQXbDpbvxm5Dft071j2OqgcJGILeCYSXF72zwM1_Ir6QkNm5iR4HV=s68-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj)

Genspark Products & Guides31.6K subscribers

[Watch on](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oEsxQVYosAs)

### **What is it?**

**[Custom Super Agent](https://mainfunc.ai/blog/genspark_custom_agent)** is Genspark’s answer to OpenAI’s [Custom GPTs](https://www.whytryai.com/p/build-gpts) or [Gemini Gems](https://gemini.google/overview/gems/). The idea is that you can—with a simple prompt—create a reusable agent that performs a specific task (kind of like [skills for Claude Code](https://www.whytryai.com/i/185003109/2-using-claude-code-with-claude-skills)). You can use your custom agent yourself or share it with others.

There’s also an active agent store where you can discover and use custom agents made by other Genspark users.

### **Example use case**

I tested this by building a simple learning tool that turns any article into a few basic learning materials like flash cards and quizzes.

> **Prompt:** _Build an agent that converts a user-provided URL into an interactive study pack consisting of:_
>
> _1\. Topic summary with top 5 takeaways_
>
> _2\. Helpful flash cards for mastering key concepts_
>
> _3\. A multiple-choice quiz with at least 10 questions._

[![Screenshot of Genspark Custom Super Agent prompt to create a reusable agent that turns any URL into a study pack with summaries, flash cards, and a quiz](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!zCwi!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc48d730c-e9b2-48ca-a9b8-d3ab1c44dd20_606x190.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!zCwi!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc48d730c-e9b2-48ca-a9b8-d3ab1c44dd20_606x190.png)

Here’s the resulting custom agent that you’re free to test with your own materials:

[Check out Study Pack Creator](https://www.genspark.ai/agents?type=custom_super_agent&agent_id=bee0db1a-6bd0-40dc-9c6c-cb9315d53b10)

### **What is it?**

**[Genspark Hub](https://mainfunc.ai/blog/genspark_hub)** is a way to keep your work organized within the dashboard, similar to the “Projects” feature in ChatGPT or Claude. You can create a separate hub for each of your projects or work areas, complete with custom instructions, background files, and more. Every conversation within the hub will have access to all of its context.

### **Example use case**

I can create a dedicated Genspark hub for “Why Try AI” with brand assets, previous newsletter issues, and more. I can then request something like a new featured image and Genspark should have enough context to generate a new image that’s aligned with my

> **Prompt**: _Create a horizontal featured image for a guest post about Genspark using reference images from this hub._

[![Screenshot of Genspark Hub showing a Why Try AI project space with a prompt to create a featured image using shared brand assets and reference files](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!YiFy!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc8381b9d-ffe3-449a-8520-94a2a88750dd_797x319.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!YiFy!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc8381b9d-ffe3-449a-8520-94a2a88750dd_797x319.png)

Here’s the result, inspired by the color palette and composition of the [“Sunday Rundown”](https://www.whytryai.com/s/10x-ai) image I provided in the hub:

[![Featured image with bold “Genspark” text over an orange and yellow starburst explosion on a beige background, reflecting the Sunday Rundown color palette and Genspark branding](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!YSAK!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2490c40e-6dac-4231-a790-c58b660296c2_1600x893.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!YSAK!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2490c40e-6dac-4231-a790-c58b660296c2_1600x893.png)

Genspark Products & Guides31.6K subscribers

### **What is it?**

**[Genspark AI Workspace](https://mainfunc.ai/blog/genspark_ai_workspace_and_series_b_funding)** is a soft rebrand of the entire Genspark concept, following the company’s Series B. It’s the umbrella name for the dashboard that pulls together all of Genspark’s research, planning, and asset-creation agents and tools.

It also comes with several new tools and updates:

- **Genspark AI Inbox**: Collects and analyzes your emails (with permission).

- **Genspark Teams**: Shared collaborative workspace for your entire team.

- **Genspark AI Sheets 2.0**: AI agent that can analyze and visualize data.


### **Example use case**

To understand and appreciate the all-in-one nature of Genspark’s AI platform, I encourage you to read the first Genspark guest post I wrote back in May:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!mF83!,w_56,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc548f8c4-823b-4a2a-b499-528f9a84cb5c_215x215.png)AI Supremacy \\
\\
Genspark's Stunning AI Pivot - Search to Super Agent \\
\\
Hey Everyone…\\

Read more\\

10 months ago · 50 likes · Michael Spencer 🇨🇦🇹🇼 and Daniel Nest](https://www.ai-supremacy.com/p/gensparks-stunning-ai-pivot-to-super-agent?utm_source=substack&utm_campaign=post_embed&utm_medium=web)

The main idea is that a single prompt sent to the Genspark Super Agent can automatically call upon multiple AI tools that collect and analyze information, plan execution steps, and generate new outputs in relevant formats.

### **What is it?**

**[Genspark AI Workspace 2.0](https://mainfunc.ai/blog/genspark_ai_workspace_2)** (in)conveniently dropped yesterday, just as I was wrapping up this very post. It is an evolution of “AI Workspace 1.0” from last November and comes with a few new features and improvements to existing ones.

#### New stuff:

- **[Speakly](https://www.speakly.ai/en)**: A new dictation assistant (think [Wispr Flow](https://wisprflow.ai/) and [Superwhisper](https://superwhisper.com/)) that you can download for macOS or Windows. It lets you interact with all of Genspark’s agents and tools via voice instead of typing.

- **AI Music Agent** that can create custom music (think [Suno](https://suno.com/home)).

- **AI Audio Agent** that does voiceovers and narration (think [ElevenLabs](https://elevenlabs.io/)).


#### Upgrades:

- **AI Inbox** now supports automated workflows that perform specific actions like creating daily inbox digests, interacting with external messaging platforms like Slack, analyzing social media performance, and more. Pick from dozens of premade workflows or create your own.

- **AI Creative Slides**, **AI Image Agent**, and **AI Video Agent** are all more capable and incorporate the improved powers of newer, better underlying models.


## **Wrap-up**

Genspark is iterating and evolving fast. Apart from the major launches above, Genspark is always quick to expand its existing AI agents with the latest available third-party models.

Each new feature builds upon and improves existing ones, making the entire platform increasingly more capable and useful.

Are you already a frequent Genspark user? Which features are the most useful to you?

## Description

```
👉 Get Started with Genspark - https://www.genspark.ai/?utm_source=yt&utm_campaign=InternetMadeCoder

In the past year, I have definitely hit AI fatigue: there are so many different models, all optimized for different things, which means constant switching between them, maintaining countless API keys and keeping up with all the latest changes.

As a developer, this is not what I want to do - I want to build.

But it feels like I have to do it, otherwise I will fall behind.

So what if there was a way to simply subscribe to one tool which then in turn connects to all these different AI tools.

Well it turns out there is - it’s called Genspark, and it has been taking over the AI space like wildfire, going from concept to $155M ARR (Annual Run Rate) in 10 months.
```
